text: Add related-ticket links separate from dependencies

workaround: 'gittoc note T-5 "related: T-3"' is sufficient for most cases. A real related-tickets field needs schema change + render + show changes for modest benefit. Deferring below T-65/T-64 which have clearer value. Revisit if user requests it concretely.

Design note: relation-like features are starting to cluster (related tickets, duplicate-of, maybe parent/epic). If any of them get implemented, it would be better to choose a coherent relation model once than to add several unrelated ad-hoc fields over time.
